note: NORMATIVE (gate item 2). Declaration promoted [] -> [selection] per D10 rev 2 (backlog #8): objective-driven baselining is a real selection use, and a tool that cannot handle this facet must stop working on that data - fail-closed engages only when declarations are honest. Rating values are the authority's own scale, frozen by the pinned schema, never normalized (the measured '1'/'0' scale shares nothing with anyone - App. F Q22).
